hero.art_prompt: Karthik, a 26 year old Indian graduate in smart-casual, confidently starting an online MBA application on a laptop, relieved and hopeful, bright tidy home office.

panels.narration: A graduate with work experience, Karthik wanted an MBA.
panels.img_prompt: Karthik, 26, with a laptop looking unsure at a confusing admissions page, hopeful but puzzled, tidy home office.

panels.narration: The forms and steps felt scattered and confusing.
panels.img_prompt: Karthik with scattered documents and notes, trying to make sense of MBA admission requirements, focused and determined.

panels.narration: Then he found one simple online admission process.
panels.img_prompt: Karthik smiling with relief at a laptop showing a clean, simple step-by-step MBA admission process, warm bright home office.

panels.narration: He applied in minutes, guided at every step.
panels.img_prompt: Karthik happily submitting his MBA application on a laptop, a small confident thumbs up, proud and relieved, warm light.

turn.title: How MBA Admission Works
points: Eligibility is simple: a bachelor's degree in any stream.
The whole application is online, so you can apply from home in minutes.
No entrance exam. Admission is merit based, and work experience is welcome.
Upload your documents, pay the registration fee, and a counsellor guides you through.

testimonials.name: Karthik Joshi
testimonials.quote: I thought admission would be stressful. The online steps were clear and a counsellor guided me throughout.

testimonials.name: Rohan Gupta
testimonials.quote: I came from an engineering background and still joined the MBA easily. No entrance exam needed.

testimonials.name: Aisha Khan
testimonials.quote: I applied from my phone at home. Uploading documents and paying the fee took only a few minutes.

testimonials.name: Nikhil Rao
testimonials.quote: Every time I had a doubt, my counsellor answered. Admission felt easy and well supported.

facts.v: A bachelor's degree in any stream
Merit based, no entrance exam, work experience welcome
